calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-25-1985, first codicil dated Apr-04-2001, second codicil dated May-30-2001, and third codicil dated Apr-01-2002 are admitted to probate. David Moffitt is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-06-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
